name: orrgal1
description: orrgal1 — self-contained, repo-agnostic Claude Code plugins (forge, devloop, diagnose, grind, persona, reviewable, graphify-wrapper, welcome)

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: PR forge chain: /forge-setup maps host-repo tooling into $FORGE_HOME (~/.claude/forge/<repo-key>/), then the chain drives a PR from a source brief through goals, scenarios, tests, design, impl, continuous CI, and lens-designed review to READY — then hands off to peer review. forge works best with two companion plugins it uses by default for its agent capabilities — @orrgal1/devloop for the PR ops, @orrgal1/grind for the iteration loop; they're the default backing, so the chain needs them installed (or the capability repointed via /forge-setup) to run, and forge halts a step (PROVIDER_MISSING) when an un-overridden capability's default provider is missing. The restack capability needs no companion — it has a built-in git fallback (configurable to a skill like @orrgal1/devloop's /restack or command/instructions). Recovery playbooks ([playbooks.<name>]) let forge self-heal known capability failures — e.g. an expired ECR/SSO token triggers `aws sso login` then a retry — instead of blocking to ask; forge also offers to capture new playbooks on the fly when a recurring failure is cleared manually.

plugins.name: diagnose
plugins.description: Portable, repo-agnostic diagnostic toolkit — /root-cause, /hypothesize, /pepper, /trace. No dependency on other plugins.

plugins.name: grind
plugins.description: /grind — general bounded-autonomy iteration loop toward any verifiable target; grinds to green, commits each step, stops at success or budget. Self-contained, repo-agnostic.

plugins.name: persona
plugins.description: Simple inlined persona — /setup-persona writes ~/.claude/persona.md (idempotent) and ensures CLAUDE.md @-imports it; /load-persona swaps in a named persona from the builtin pool. No dependency on other plugins.

plugins.name: reviewable
plugins.description: Reviewable.io automation via agent-browser — /reviewable-read, /reviewable-reply, /reviewable-publish, /reviewable-login. Repo-agnostic (resolves owner/repo from git origin).

plugins.name: devloop
plugins.description: Thin, repo-agnostic dev-loop + PR-ops skills, chain-blind so forge consumes them via its capability map (no dependency on other plugins). Stacked-PR restack — /restack (bring a PR's base into its branch, syncing upstream first; merge/rebase per operator preference) and /restack-all (bottom-up across a stack). Review — /review (parallel lens fan-out + built-in /code-review + /security-review → one ranked verdict), /review-watch (re-arm on each new review event), /address-review (drive reviewer feedback to resolution), /request-review (rank + gated-request the best peer reviewer). CI — /ci-green (bounded fix-to-green, optional --until-merge monitor). Plus /find-blocker (classify a PR's external blocker), /pr-brief (idempotent 1–3 sentence PR brief), /deslop (strip AI slop from a diff, reusing /simplify), /stuck-check (in-loop rabbit-hole detector).

plugins.name: graphify-wrapper
plugins.description: Thin harness over the graphify knowledge-graph CLI for monorepos + worktrees — /graphify-wrapper-setup, /graphify-wrapper-map (analyze & propose domains to index), /graphify-wrapper-index (register named domains), /graphify-wrapper-sync (on-demand; AST default + --semantic via claude-cli; seeds worktrees from main), /graphify-wrapper-query, /graphify-wrapper-status. Graphs live in-tree (gitignored, never pushed); only the registry lives centrally. No dependency on other plugins.

plugins.name: welcome
plugins.description: Onboarding for the orrgal1 marketplace — /welcome runs an interactive, idempotent walkthrough: prerequisites (gh, SSH remotes), recommended 3rd-party plugins (claude-mem, caveman, context7, official bundle), persona, graphify-wrapper, per-repo forge setup, then prints a usage guide for every orrgal1 plugin. No dependency on other plugins.
